home.shared: This string comes from packages/shared and is reused directly in apps/web.

hero.title: Huntercat rapid development system for digital products
hero.subtitle: huntercat-boot helps teams ship faster with an out-of-the-box engineering foundation and a rich set of reusable capabilities, so you can focus on business value.

points.title: Out of the box:
points.desc: Standard foundation to start projects fast

points.title: Feature-rich:
points.desc: Common modules and components ready to use

points.title: Team-ready:
points.desc: Unified conventions and extensibility for collaboration

pain.title: What slows teams down
pain.subtitle: From zero to one, teams often get stuck rebuilding the same foundations and dealing with inconsistent collaboration.
items: High setup cost: auth, permissions, logs, config, i18n repeatedly rebuilt
Slow delivery: scattered modules and inconsistent conventions increase overhead
Risky iterations: missing unified foundations makes maintenance harder over time

gain.title: How huntercat-boot helps
gain.subtitle: We turn foundations into reusable building blocks so rapid development becomes repeatable.
items: Prebuilt foundations to reduce duplicated work and focus on business value
Modular structure with unified conventions, easy to extend and maintain
Supports the full journey from prototype to production with continuous iterations

features.title: Out-of-the-box capabilities
features.subtitle: Common capabilities for fast-moving teams, available by default and extensible when needed.

rbac.title: Roles & Permissions
rbac.desc: Built-in user/role/permission model with role-based feature and data access control.

menu.title: Menu & Routing
menu.desc: Menu and routing configuration aligned for navigation and access control across modules.

audit.title: Audit Logs
audit.desc: Key operations are traceable for troubleshooting, compliance and accountability.

config.title: Config Center
config.desc: Centralized runtime configuration and business parameters to reduce environment drift.

i18n.title: Internationalization
i18n.desc: Built-in i18n solution for fast language switching and scalable expansion.

theme.title: Themes
theme.desc: Light/Dark/System themes to match enterprise style and user preferences.

upload.title: File Upload
upload.desc: Unified upload and storage strategy for attachments, contracts and documents.

notify.title: Notifications
notify.desc: In-app notification system to keep key events visible and reduce missed handoffs.

solutions.title: Where it fits
solutions.subtitle: From internal systems to industry products, ship fast and iterate safely.

items.title: Internal management systems
items.desc: Build admin panels, workflows and permission management quickly.

items.title: Industry business systems
items.desc: Deliver small-to-mid business systems from zero to launch more efficiently.

items.title: Multi-project delivery
items.desc: Use one foundation across projects to reduce long-term maintenance cost.

items.title: Delivery & agency teams
items.desc: Prototype faster, deliver more reliably, reuse more.

items.name: Jiangxi LinkeanShi Law Firm
